name: Extended-release melatonin
summary: Decision-ready summary: Extended-release melatonin is best framed for sleep maintenance; circadian rhythm support; safety screen: pregnancy without clinician guidance; sedatives; next-day drowsiness risk.
description: Extended-release melatonin supports sleep maintenance by stabilizing circadian timing and nighttime melatonin availability, with clinical confidence stronger for sleep onset/maintenance outcomes.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
